output_text:
- What happened: Payment API p95 latency jumped from 420ms → 1480ms in the last 10 minutes; checkout success rate fell from 98.8% → 94.9%. No indicators of data loss.
- Recent change: pricing-cache refresh worker was deployed at 03:20 UTC — likely suspect given timing.
- Impact: user-facing checkout slowdowns and increased failures (~3.9% absolute drop in success rate).
- Immediate triage (start now): check pricing-cache worker logs/metrics (errors, CPU, memory, DB calls), correlate Payment API traces/errors to the worker deploy timestamp, and check Payment API pod metrics and SLO/timeout errors. Restart or roll back the worker if correlation is strong.
- Monitor & escalate: watch p95 and success rate closely for 15 minutes after any remediation; if no improvement, escalate to SRE and the pricing-cache owner and consider full rollback.
